name: EmptyState
description: Illustrated placeholder for empty lists with call-to-action.

api.name: EmptyState
api.description: Illustrated placeholder for empty lists with call-to-action.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: Custom illustration slot for branded empty states. Wins over IconContent when both are provided. Use for SVGs / images where the icon doesn't carry enough brand weight (404, broken state, onboarding hero).

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<EmptyState
    Title="No results found"
    Description="Try adjusting your search or filters." />

examples.title: With Icon and Action
examples.code:
<EmptyState Title="No projects yet" Description="Get started by creating your first project.">
    <IconContent>
        <DynamicIcon Name="Plus" Class="h-10 w-10" />
    </IconContent>
    <Action>
        <Button>Create Project</Button>
    </Action>
</EmptyState>

examples.title: Inbox Empty
examples.code:
<EmptyState Title="Inbox zero" Description="You have no new messages.">
    <IconContent>
        <DynamicIcon Name="Mail" Class="h-10 w-10" />
    </IconContent>
</EmptyState>

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

slots.name: Image
slots.description: Custom illustration slot for branded empty states. Wins over IconContent when both are provided. Use for SVGs / images where the icon doesn't carry enough brand weight (404, broken state, onboarding hero).

mdSummary:
# EmptyState

Illustrated placeholder for empty lists with call-to-action.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/empty-state

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| EmptyState | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| EmptyState | Image | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom illustration slot for branded empty states. Wins over IconContent when both are provided. Use for SVGs / images where the icon doesn't carry enough brand weight (404, broken state, onboarding hero). |
| EmptyState | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| EmptyState | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| EmptyState | Action | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| EmptyState | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| EmptyState | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `IconContent` (EmptyState) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.
- `Image` (EmptyState) — Custom illustration slot for branded empty states. Wins over IconContent when both are provided. Use for SVGs / images where the icon doesn't carry enough brand weight (404, broken state, onboarding hero).
- `Action` (EmptyState) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<EmptyState />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/EmptyState/EmptyState.razor`
